=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (1:18-1:23) TS6133: 'Layer' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (6:13-6:20) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn("UserService.getUser")(function*(id) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"UserService.getUser\")"

[D3] (7:17-9:19) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"UserService.getUser\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredServiceMake.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class UserService extends Context.Service<UserService>()("UserService", {
    make: Effect.gen(function*() {
        return {
    getUser: Effect.fn("UserService.getUser")(function* (id: string) {
        yield* Effect.log(`Looking up user ${id}`);
    })
};
    })
}) {}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredServiceMake.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class UserService extends Context.Service<UserService>()("UserService", {
    make: Effect.gen(function*() {
        return {
            getUser: (id: string) => Effect.log(`Looking up user ${id}`)
        }
    })
}) {}
